info.title: KK API
info.description: Alpha version of the KK API. Subject to change without deprecation.

get.description: Retrieves a list of branches in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the file tree at the given branch and path in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the file tree at the given branch and path in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the file tree at the given branch and path in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the file tree at the given branch and path in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the content of a file in the git repository associated with this entity.
Retrieves the content of a file in the git repository associated with this entity.

post.description: Creates a new branch in the git repository associated with this entity, pointing at the given ref (branch or SHA).

delete.description: Deletes a branch from the git repository associated with this entity.

post.description: Locks the git repository to reject all pushes and prevent modifications (e.g., during an evaluation).
Unlocks a previously locked git repository, allowing pushes and modifications again.

post.summary: Request a review for a user project
post.description: Creates review entries for the specified kinds. Self reviews are auto-assigned to the requesting user.

get.summary: Get a single review by its ID
get.description: Returns the review with full details including reviewer and rubric.

delete.description: Cancels the review with the specified ID.

get.summary: Get annotations for a specific file in a review
get.description: Returns the review with full details including reviewer and rubric.

put.summary: Get annotations for a specific file in a review
put.description: Returns the review with full details including reviewer and rubric.

get.summary: Get review progress for a user project

post.summary: Assign a reviewer to a pending review
post.description: Assigns the specified user as reviewer for the review. Validates that the reviewer meets the rubric's eligibility requirements.
Transitions the review to InProgress and assigns the current user as the reviewer.
Transitions the review to Finished. The review content should be included in the request body.

parameters.description: The name of the property to use for sorting.

parameters.name: sort[order]
parameters.description: The sort direction.

parameters.name: page[index]
parameters.description: The page number/index

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: The amount of results per page

get.description: Retrieve a specific rubric by ID

put.description: Replaces the review kind composition for a rubric. Omitted kinds are disabled.

post.summary: Subscribe a user to a cursus
post.description: Enroll the specified user in the given cursus. Staff can enroll other users.

delete.summary: Unsubscribe a user from a cursus
delete.description: Remove the specified user's enrollment from the given cursus. Staff can unenroll other users.

post.summary: Subscribe a user to a goal
post.description: Create a subscription for the specified user to the given goal. Staff can enroll other users.

delete.summary: Unsubscribe a user from a goal
delete.description: Remove the specified user's subscription to the given goal. Staff can unenroll other users.

post.summary: Subscribe a user to a project
post.description: Create a project session for the specified user. Staff can enroll other users.

delete.summary: Unsubscribe a user from a project
delete.description: Remove the specified user from the project session. Staff can unenroll other users.

get.summary: Get user cursus by cursus ID
get.description: Finds the user's enrollment in a specific cursus by the cursus's own ID.

get.summary: Get user cursus by entity ID
get.description: Finds a user cursus enrollment directly by its own entity ID, without requiring a user context.
Returns the user's frozen track snapshot with per-node progression state and unlock status.
Returns all goal subscriptions for the specified user. Supports filtering by state and goal name.

get.summary: Get user goal by goal ID
get.description: Finds the user's subscription to a specific goal by the goal's own ID.

get.summary: Get user goal by entity ID
get.description: Finds a user goal subscription directly by its own entity ID, without requiring a user context.
Returns all active project sessions the user is a member of. Supports filtering by name, slug, and state.

parameters.description: The page number/index

get.summary: Get user project by project ID
get.description: Finds the user's session for a specific project by the project's own ID.

get.summary: Get user project by entity ID
get.description: Finds a user project session directly by its own entity ID, without requiring a user context.
Returns the paginated activity timeline of the specified user project session, ordered by the requested sort.

post.summary: Invite a user to a project session
post.description: The calling user (leader) invites another user to their active project session.

delete.description: The session leader cancels a pending invitation before it is accepted.

post.description: The invited user accepts a pending invitation to join a project session.
The invited user declines a pending invitation to join a project session.

put.description: Transfer leadership of a project session to another user.

post.description: The user leaves a project session.

post.summary: Kick a member from a project
post.description: Remove a member from a project session.

get.summary: Get the workspace of the user
get.description: Retrieves the workspace of the currently authenticated user

get.summary: Get the workspace of the root
get.description:
The root workspace is a staff managed workspace that contains the campus's curated entities
such as official cursi, projects or rubrics.

post.description: Create a new cursus to be added to the workspace
Directly create a new goal to be added to the workspace
Directly create a new project to be added to the workspace
Create a new rubric to be added to the workspace
Create a new application client linked to this workspace and fetch its initial credential secret.

patch.description: Update an existing application metadata configuration and synchronize changes out to Keycloak.

delete.description: Permanently delete an application registration and dismantle its linked client in Keycloak.

post.description: Demotes the active secret to fallback 'rotated' status and issues a brand-new primary secret for zero-downtime migrations.
Transfer one or more cursus from one workspace to another
Transfer one or more goals from one workspace to another
Transfer one or more projects from one workspace to another

post.summary: Invite a user to a workspace
post.description: Invites another user to the workspace, granting them access to its projects and resources upon acceptance.

delete.description: The session leader cancels a pending invitation before it is accepted.

post.description: Accept an invitation to join a workspace, granting access to its projects and resources.
Declines the currently authenticated user's pending invitation to join the workspace.
The user leaves a workspace.

post.summary: Kick a member from a workspace
post.description: Remove a member from a workspace.

goalId.description: The goal ID this node represents.

parentId.description: The parent goal ID within this cursus track. Null for root-level goals.

group.description: Choice group identifier for alternative goals. Siblings with the same value are alternatives; null means required.

redirectUris.description: List of allowed redirect URIs after authentication.

active.description: Indicates whether the goal is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the goal is publicly visible.

projects.description: The list of project IDs to initalize this goal with.

active.description: Indicates whether the project is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the project is currently public.

maxMembers.description: The maximum number of members allowed in the project.

markdown.description: Optional markdown documentation for the rubric.

public.description: Indicates whether the rubric is publicly visible.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the rubric is enabled.

markdown.description: Optional markdown biography or about text.

displayName.description: The display name for the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

redirectUris.description: List of allowed redirect URIs after authentication.

active.description: Indicates whether the cursus is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the cursus is publicly visible.

variant.description: The cursus variant: Static (fixed track) or Dynamic (free-roam).

completionMode.description: How users progress through the track: Ring (level-by-level) or FreeStyle (branch-independent).

nodes.description: The flat list of track nodes forming the cursus hierarchy.

active.description: Indicates whether the goal is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the goal is publicly visible.

projects.description: The list of project IDs to initalize this goal with.

active.description: Indicates whether the project is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the project is currently public.

maxMembers.description: The maximum number of members allowed in the project.

files.description: The list of files to initialize the project repository with.

userProjectId.description: The user project ID being reviewed.

ref.description: The SHA of the commit that this review is associated with, if applicable.

markdown.description: Optional markdown documentation for the rubric.

public.description: Indicates whether the rubric is publicly visible.

projectId.description: Optional project ID this rubric is associated with.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the rubric is enabled.

variants.description: The list of review variant requirements for this rubric.

title.description: A user-friendly name for the SSH key (e.g., 'Work Laptop').

gitInfo.description: The associated Git repository information for this project.

workspace.description: The workspace to which this project belongs.

name.description: The display name of the project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project's purpose or contents.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the project.

active.description: Indicates whether the project is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the project is publicly visible.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether the project has been deprecated.

maxMembers.description: Indicates whether the project has been deprecated.

name.description: The display name of the project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project's purpose or contents.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the project.

active.description: Indicates whether the project is currently active.

public.description: Indicates whether the project is publicly visible.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether the project has been deprecated.

maxMembers.description: Indicates whether the project has been deprecated.

variants.description: The list of review variant requirements for this rubric.

kind.description: The kind of review this variant represents.

requires.description: How many reviews of this kind are required.

kind.description: The review kind this variant applies to.

required.description: The number of reviews of this kind required (0-100).

state.description: The current state of the object.

project.description: The project template this instance is based on.

oneOf.description: Git repository information for this project instance.
